hidden_defects.condition: summary portfolio source could be changed to LEDGER/PASS without binding to a validated PAPER portfolio snapshot
hidden_defects.impact: dashboard could display cash/equity/PnL as verified even when provenance was missing
hidden_defects.fix: summary schema and validator now require snapshot hash, PASS snapshot status, and simulated PAPER ledger balance kind

hidden_defects.condition: verified summary cash/equity/PnL values could be mutated independently after summary construction
hidden_defects.impact: operator could see inconsistent total asset and PnL values on the first dashboard screen
hidden_defects.fix: summary validator now checks equity and total PnL arithmetic for verified portfolio summaries
